TMNT (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,149,098Details
International Box Office $41,946,920
Worldwide Box Office $96,096,018
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $31,385,452
Total $31,385,452
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,255,205 (44.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,110 opening theaters/3,120 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $94,131,276

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: August 7th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for animated action violence, some scary cartoon images and mild language
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: False Identity, Friends Reuniting, Martial Arts, Monster, Mutants, Non-Chronological, Talking Animals, Underwater
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Imagi Studios
Production Countries: United States, Hong Kong
Languages: English
